T0265.title: Lead Handling
T0265.definition: Jiefen refers to the initial chat operation stage in a traffic funnel, where a dedicated handler manages the first round of conversations after adding new contacts to quickly build trust and identify high-potential targets.
T0265.description: 该环节通常由专业聊天团队执行，通过预设话术与用户进行初步互动，目的是将引流来的陌生人转化为可进一步收割的潜在受害者。常见于杀猪盘、色情诈骗等场景，接粉质量直接影响后续诈骗转化率。
T0265.usageExample: Professional traffic drainage from overseas countries, high-quality powder [recommended to use receiving powder] Thank you 007
